symptoms.symptom_name: Violaceous polygonal planar papules with Wickham striae and Koebnerisation

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: The six Ps with Wickham striae and Koebner are characteristic of LP.
Psoriasis is extensor with silvery scale, not violaceous with Wickham striae.
Reticulate oral LP supports the diagnosis; erosive forms need specialist care.
Absence of a new drug, blistering or peeling argues against a drug eruption/SCAR.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Baseline bloods including hepatitis C serology
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: LP is associated with HCV; baseline bloods before/around steroid therapy.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Skin/oral biopsy if diagnosis uncertain or erosive oral disease
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: To confirm LP and for oral LP surveillance where indicated.
